business_ideas.idea: Sora - AI video generation with face/voice synthesis enabling multiplayer social content creation.
Sunflower Sober - AI-based addiction recovery app replacing human sponsors with always-available support.
Personalized AI learning tutor tailored to individual knowledge gaps and goals.

predictions.text: Sora will become fastest-to-100M-downloads app, potentially most downloaded in history.
OpenAI may become larger than Facebook, Google, and major media companies combined.
Multiplayer AI apps will dominate over single-player tools as adoption accelerates.
